'''âr-t-m-k''' ('''karatmekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:labyrinth|labyrinth]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-t-m-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:labyrinth|labyrinth]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-t-m-k
|-
! Lemma
| karatmekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiratmekoko|thiratmekoko]] || [[word:jiratmekoko|jiratmekoko]] || [[word:shiratmekoko|shiratmekoko]] || [[word:kiratmekoko|kiratmekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuratmekoko|thuthuratmekoko]] || [[word:jujuratmekoko|jujuratmekoko]] || [[word:shushuratmekoko|shushuratmekoko]] || [[word:kukuratmekoko|kukuratmekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuratmekoko|thuratmekoko]] || [[word:juratmekoko|juratmekoko]] || [[word:shuratmekoko|shuratmekoko]] || [[word:kuratmekoko|kuratmekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuratmekoko|thuratmekoko]] || [[word:juratmekoko|juratmekoko]] || [[word:shuratmekoko|shuratmekoko]] || [[word:kuratmekoko|kuratmekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theratmekoko|theratmekoko]] || [[word:jeratmekoko|jeratmekoko]] || [[word:sheratmekoko|sheratmekoko]] || [[word:keratmekoko|keratmekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoratmekoko|thothoratmekoko]] || [[word:jojoratmekoko|jojoratmekoko]] || [[word:shoshoratmekoko|shoshoratmekoko]] || [[word:kokoratmekoko|kokoratmekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoratmekoko|thoratmekoko]] || [[word:joratmekoko|joratmekoko]] || [[word:shoratmekoko|shoratmekoko]] || [[word:koratmekoko|koratmekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoratmekoko|thoratmekoko]] || [[word:joratmekoko|joratmekoko]] || [[word:shoratmekoko|shoratmekoko]] || [[word:koratmekoko|koratmekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠratmekoko|thĂŠratmekoko]] || [[word:jĂŠratmekoko|jĂŠratmekoko]] || [[word:shĂŠratmekoko|shĂŠratmekoko]] || [[word:kĂŠratmekoko|kĂŠratmekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharatmekoko|thatharatmekoko]] || [[word:jajaratmekoko|jajaratmekoko]] || [[word:shasharatmekoko|shasharatmekoko]] || [[word:kakaratmekoko|kakaratmekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharatmekoko|tharatmekoko]] || [[word:jaratmekoko|jaratmekoko]] || [[word:sharatmekoko|sharatmekoko]] || [[word:karatmekoko|karatmekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharatmekoko|tharatmekoko]] || [[word:jaratmekoko|jaratmekoko]] || [[word:sharatmekoko|sharatmekoko]] || [[word:karatmekoko|karatmekoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
